currentFocus: Docs/state now reflect the parallel integration wave: PatchBench receipt behavior tests before extraction, public-safe TMM ARM4 proof-plan/checker progress, Lore pack metadata integrity hardening, Save Lab route persistence, storage no-delete, runtime private pre-arm-only, and report-attested consult compliance.

currentDocsTruth.patchBenchReceiptBehavior: PatchBenchSafeCopyReceiptTextTests is integrated as pre-extraction behavior coverage for a WinUI-local primitive receipt formatter scaffold. The scaffold is unwired and proves only the forward contract: layout, normalization, hostile display-value fail-closed checks, online-ready wording rejection, and existing page Host/Join append/no-duplicate characterization.
currentDocsTruth.patchBenchExtractionBoundary: BinaryPatchesPage remains the live owner of receipt projection, AppCore receipt DTO consumption, File/Path/I/O, launch planning, process control, patch/catalog semantics, Host/Join fallback, online boundaries, and runtime-proof boundaries. No helper wiring or source-summary extraction is complete.
currentDocsTruth.patchBenchNextBaton: Before wiring the helper, add tests for concatenated/interpolated forbidden sentinels, manifest filename policy, Host/Join partial/variant boundaries, and page-versus-helper parity with documented intentional deltas.
currentDocsTruth.primitiveProjectionBoundary: The primitive projection guard now includes the new receipt helper/model split under the strict receipt/source projection profile. It remains static source-test coverage, not runtime proof or extraction readiness by itself.
currentDocsTruth.rebuildProofPlan: The tmm-arm4-readiness-gate proof-plan/checker slot is materialized as public-safe planning and continuity evidence only. It is not readiness-gate execution, command arming, importer execution, generated payload output, private asset read, runtime proof, visual/gameplay proof, rebuild parity, runtime parity, or no-noticeable-difference parity.
currentDocsTruth.lorePackIntegrity: Lore pack relativePath index/content equality is validated by builder/check tooling. AppCore content-pack loading validates loaded document paths, duplicate ids/paths, hash mismatch, and stale pack retention after invalid loads with generic error text for row-controlled relativePath/id/hash values that LorePage can surface.
currentDocsTruth.loreNextBaton: ZIP package probe parity for the same lore-pack relativePath grammar remains open, and a future slice should decide whether AppCore also enforces index/content relativePath equality instead of leaving that to builder/check tooling. Do not describe the Lore hardening as release readiness or a broad filesystem traversal fix.
currentDocsTruth.winuiUxSummary: The WinUI UX lane fixed only persisted Save Lab route restoration for LastTab=0. Residual UX/copy/accessibility work remains open and should be handled one small slice at a time.
currentDocsTruth.storageSummary: Storage taxonomy is summarized only as read-only/no-delete: high-confidence deletion candidates 0, deletion performed false, authorized reclaimed storage 0 GiB, actual reclaimed storage 0 GiB. Future medium/low logical values must not appear in durable state as budgets, targets, urgency, candidate pools, or reclaimable storage.
currentDocsTruth.runtimeProofBaton: Runtime music proof remains private pre-arm checklist-only/no-live with readyToRunLiveAttempt=false, liveArmAllowed=false, runtimeAudibleOutputProof=false, and preArmReadiness.status=prearm-readiness-not-proven. Producer coverage is not live authority or proof readiness.
currentDocsTruth.consultEvidence: Consult evidence for workers and this integration is accepted with caveats. Integration review used Codex normal, Codex adversarial, composer-2.5-fast normal/adversarial, and gemini-3.1-pro normal/adversarial lanes. Evidence remains report-attested and sanitized-bundle scanned, not raw prompt/output reconstruction or exact Cursor command-line proof.
currentDocsTruth.externalSanitization: Do not copy raw prompts, local campaign paths, thread IDs, raw reports, private proof paths, local manifests, or exact local storage/proof paths into tracked docs/state.
currentDocsTruth.claimBoundary: No AppCore receipt construction, launch argument behavior, selected-state logic beyond Save Lab route restore, safe-copy planning, process control, patch catalog row, byte patch, Host/Join availability, online readiness, runtime proof, release/publication, gameplay, visual parity, rebuild parity, no-noticeable-difference parity, Ghidra mutation, hard payload, installed-game, or original-BEA mutation claim changed.

validation.expectation: Use docs/repo/payload gates plus focused PatchBench/Lore/RE checks and WinUI/AppCore/UiTests gates required by the accepted changes.
